info.name: Ecommerce Microservice
info.description: Professional Postman collection for testing and demoing the ecommerce microservice endpoints, exposed through the API gateway on port 8080. Requests are grouped by service and feature, covering authentication flows, user profile management, and fine-grained RBAC (roles, permissions, role-permission assignment, and user-role assignment). Run Authentication / Register User and Authentication / Login Admin first to populate the token variables used by all secured requests.

request.description: Registers a new active user account. This endpoint is public and does not require a bearer token. A unique username and email are generated via a timestamp suffix so the request can be run repeatedly without conflicts.
Authenticates a registered user and stores the returned access and refresh tokens as ACCESS_TOKEN and REFRESH_TOKEN for use in user-scoped endpoints.
Authenticates the seeded demo administrator and stores admin tokens as ADMIN_ACCESS_TOKEN and ADMIN_REFRESH_TOKEN for all secured /api/v1/admin requests.
Rotates the refresh token and stores the newly returned access and refresh token pair. The old refresh token is revoked server-side. This endpoint is public and does not require a bearer token.
Logs out the authenticated user by revoking the submitted refresh token and blacklisting the active access token in Redis. Requires a valid bearer token in the Authorization header.
Retrieves the authenticated user's own profile. The API gateway automatically forwards the user identity via the X-User-Id header so no additional header is needed from the client.
Updates the authenticated user's own profile fields (firstName, lastName, phoneNumber). Username and email are immutable.

exec: throw new Error('Run Authentication / Register User first so AUTH_PASSWORD is available.');

request.description: Changes the authenticated user's password after verifying the current password. The newPassword and confirmPassword fields must match and the new password must be at least 8 characters.
Verifies that the profile endpoint returns 401 when no bearer token is supplied.
Validates that firstName is required and cannot be blank for profile updates.
Validates that newPassword and confirmPassword must match.
Validates that an incorrect current password is rejected with 401.

item.name: Change Password - Too Short New Password

request.description: Validates that the new password must be at least 8 characters long.

exec: const role = roles.find(item => item.code === pm.collectionVariables.get('ROLE_CODE')) || roles[0];

request.description: Lists RBAC roles with zero-based pagination. Requires ROLE_READ permission. The test script seeds ROLE_ID from the first matching result.

exec: throw new Error('Run RBAC Management / Roles / List Roles or Create Role first so ROLE_ID is available.');

request.description: Retrieves a role by numeric identifier. Requires ROLE_READ permission.
Creates a new RBAC role. Requires ROLE_CREATE permission. The code field must match a valid RoleCode enum value defined in the service.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Role before updating a role so ROLE_ID is available.');
pm.collectionVariables.set('UPDATED_ROLE_DESCRIPTION', 'Can read, cancel, and escalate customer orders.');

request.description: Updates an existing RBAC role's name and description. Requires ROLE_UPDATE permission.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Role before deleting a role so ROLE_ID is available.');

request.description: Deletes an RBAC role by identifier. Requires ROLE_DELETE permission. ROLE_ID is unset from collection variables on success.
Verifies not-found behavior when requesting a role with an unknown identifier.
Lists RBAC permissions with zero-based pagination. Requires PERMISSION_READ permission. The test script seeds PERMISSION_ID from the first matching result.

exec: throw new Error('Run RBAC Management / Permissions / List Permissions or Create Permission first so PERMISSION_ID is available.');

request.description: Retrieves a permission by numeric identifier. Requires PERMISSION_READ permission.
Creates a new RBAC permission. Requires PERMISSION_CREATE permission. The code field must match a valid PermissionCode enum value defined in the service.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Permission before updating a permission so PERMISSION_ID is available.');
pm.collectionVariables.set('UPDATED_PERMISSION_DESCRIPTION', 'Allows support staff to browse and search customer order data.');

request.description: Updates an existing RBAC permission's name and description. Requires PERMISSION_UPDATE permission.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Permission before deleting a permission so PERMISSION_ID is available.');

request.description: Deletes an RBAC permission by identifier. Requires PERMISSION_DELETE permission. PERMISSION_ID is unset from collection variables on success.
Verifies not-found behavior when requesting a permission with an unknown identifier.

exec: throw new Error('Run RBAC Management / Roles / Create Role first so ROLE_ID is available.');

request.description: Lists all permissions currently assigned to a role. Requires ROLE_READ permission.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Role before assigning a permission so ROLE_ID is available.');
throw new Error('Run Create Permission before assigning it to a role so PERMISSION_ID is available.');

request.description: Assigns a permission to a role. Requires ROLE_CREATE permission. Returns the updated role with its full permission list.

exec: throw new Error('Run Create Role before removing a permission so ROLE_ID is available.');
throw new Error('Run Assign Permission To Role before removing a permission so PERMISSION_ID is available.');

request.description: Removes a permission from a role. Requires ROLE_DELETE permission. Returns the updated role with its remaining permission list.

exec: throw new Error('Run Authentication / Register User or User Profile / Happy Path / Get Current User Profile first so AUTH_USER_ID is available.');

request.description: Lists all roles currently assigned to a user. Requires ROLE_ASSIGN permission.

exec: throw new Error('Run Authentication / Register User first so AUTH_USER_ID is available.');
throw new Error('Run RBAC Management / Roles / Create Role first so ROLE_ID is available.');

request.description: Assigns a role to a user. Requires ROLE_ASSIGN permission. Returns the complete list of roles now held by the user.

exec: throw new Error('Run Authentication / Register User first so AUTH_USER_ID is available.');
throw new Error('Run Assign Role To User before removing a role so ROLE_ID is available.');

request.description: Removes a role from a user. Requires ROLE_ASSIGN permission. Returns the remaining roles held by the user after removal.

item.name: Assign Role To User - User Not Found

request.description: Verifies not-found behavior when assigning a role to an unknown user identifier.

variable.value: Can read and cancel customer orders.
Can read, cancel, and escalate customer orders.
Allows support staff to browse and search customer order data.
